CLAUSE.NAME: StandardWording-2
CLAUSE.value: Our present undertaking will be effective from [[[VALID_FM_DT]]] and valid until [[[EXPIRY_DT]]]. . We hereby agree that in the event of disputes arising under this guarantee, courts in the U.S.A. shall have exclusive jurisdiction in respect of any proceedings to take place, without prejudice to the [[[BENE_NM]]]'s right to take any legal proceedings or file any case, as it deems fit, before any courts outside the U.S.A.
